generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values national security and civil liberties, I've been following the debate on civil defense preparedness. It's clear that our current approach isn't doing enough to protect communities. Look at how countries like Finland and Switzerland have integrated civil defense into their national identity—it's not just about military strength, but about ensuring everyday fairness and trust in our institutions. The recent town hall in Ohio showed overwhelming support for better preparedness programs. It's time we prioritize this too. #NationalSecurity #CommunitySafety
